prompt_task: Determine the regulatory element that overlap the given variant’s reference span for this specific variant and regulatory  resource, without liftover and reporting 1-based inclusive coordinates. Variant: GRCh38, contig chr19, position 44907187, ref allele G, alt allele A. Regulatory source: ENCODE cCRE Registry, release v4. Return the class of the regulatory element overlapping the variant and the CRE accession (e.g. EH38EXXXXX) as a comma-separated list. Expected output format: "class,accession". Run the analysis inside the Galaxy environment.
